arts.ttl: 'Significant financial outlay': David Ornstein says people at Arsenal think 'extraordinary' player is joining them
Chelsea agree deal for ANOTHER Sporting Lisbon starlet - as Enzo Maresca adds 20-year-old midfielder Dario Essugo to the signing of £40million wonderkid Geovany Quenda
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL: Chelsea have agreed a deal with Sporting CP to sign another one of their starlets in Dario Essugo, following on from striking a £40million deal for Geovany Quenda.

arts.ttl: Chelsea agree £18.5m deal for midfielder Essugo
arts.sum: Chelsea agree an £18.5m fee to sign Sporting midfielder Dario Essugo, who is currently on loan at Las Palmas in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Chelsea finalise SECOND summer transfer as £18.5m fee agreed and medical 'completed'
arts.sum: Unlike Quenda, who is set to join Chelsea from Sporting in 2026, Essugo will be going straight into Maresca's first-team THIS summer when his loan deal at Las Palmas expires. A defensive midfielder that can also play further forward, Essugo is set to compete with Moises Caicedo, Romeo Lavia and Enzo Fernandez for a place in the Chelsea starting XI next season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Agree £18.5m Deal to Sign Sporting Midfielder Dario Essugo
arts.sum: Chelsea have agreed an £18.5m deal to sign Sporting Lisbon midfielder Dario Essugo, as per GIVEMESPORT senior correspondent Ben Jacobs.

arts.ttl: Forest score FOUR to move one point behind Arsenal
arts.sum: In Nuno Espirito Santo's 50th Premier League match in charge of Forest, Nikola Milenkovic got the first of three goals in six minutes before half-time with a fierce finish from inside the box. Anthony Elanga scored twice as Nottingham Forest earned a 4-2 home win over Ipswich Town to strengthen their hold on third place, moving one point behind second-placed Arsenal .

arts.ttl: 'The moment I watched them': Mikel Arteta shares what he privately thought about Chelsea in pre-season last year
William Gallas shares what Chelsea did under Jose Mourinho that 'scared' their opponents
arts.sum: Former Chelsea star William Gallas has recalled a brilliant story from his playing career at Stamford Bridge under Jose Mourinho. Retired French defender William Gallas,...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Atletico replay claim made amid penalty drama and Arsenal wait
arts.sum: The Argentine slipped as he struck the ball and it just about flew under the bar, but the referee disallowed the penalty for a double touch after an intervention from VAR. Despite multiple angles of the penalty, it is not wholly clear that Alvarez actually touched the ball with his standing foot first.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres fires cryptic transfer message after double Mikel Arteta decision made
arts.sum: As the caption of a post that showed him celebrating and placing two fingers on his pulse, he cryptically wrote: "One more time [handshake emoji]." That message arrived following his two goals against Casa Pia which proved decisive in the result. Sporting CP striker Viktor Gyokeres has, seemingly, returned to form at the perfect time - with a cryptic message subsequently sent.
